parameters:
Ugh...! Not only have I lost the young master's favor, but I'm forced to clean up the
filthy traces left by some village girl...! Th-this is humiliating...!

Sigh...I'm so jealous of that village girl... She seems to have become the young
master's favorite, and it looks like she's on the concubine track... Ugh, I want to
be on that track too...!
